title: Imperial Now Producing Renewable Diesel at Strathcona Refinery
content: Imperial has completed construction and is now producing renewable diesel at Strathcona refinery. At full capacity, it is expected to be the largest renewable diesel facility in Canada. The project was first announced in 2021 and has the capacity to produce up to 20,000 barrels a day of renewable diesel. Imperialâ€™s renewable diesel is similar to traditional diesel, can be used with no engine modifications and is well-suited for Canadaâ€™s cold weather conditions. The product is made by combining hydrogen, bio-feedstocks such as canola oil sourced from Canadian suppliers and proprietary technology.
author: Analysts Account
